title: Innovation in the Judicial System in Brazil
event: III International Congress of Law and Artificial Intelligence
description: Conference talk on how the Brazilian Judicial System is embracing technology to improve access to justice and efficiency.

title: The Problem of Automated Facial Recognition Technologies in Brazil: Social Countermovements and the New Frontiers of Fundamental Rights
description: Presented an analysis of automated facial recognition in Brazil, examining its implications for privacy, discrimination, surveillance, and the role of social countermovements in contesting the expansion of high-risk AI systems.

title: Innovation in the Court of Justice
event: I Meeting of Innovation Laboratories of the State of Minas Gerais
organisation: State Court of Justice of Minas Gerais
description: Talk on how innovation initiatives can improve judicial services, institutional procedures, user experience, and access to justice within public courts.

title: Design Thinking Workshops for the Implementation of Technology in Court Procedures
event: State Court of Justice of Minas Gerais, Brazil
organisation: State Court of Justice of Minas Gerais, Brazil
description: Between 2021 and 2023, I conducted several design thinking workshops with magistrates, judges, court clerks, and administrative staff at the State Court of Justice of Minas Gerais. These workshops mapped institutional and procedural problems, translated them into practical requirements, and supported the implementation of technologies aimed at improving judicial services, internal workflows, usability, and access to justice.

relatedReports.description: Official UAILab/TJMG report on the redesign of pre-claim forms for Small Claims Court users, using Design Thinking, plain language, and visual law.
relatedReports.label: See Report

relatedReports.description: Official UAILab/TJMG report on the redesign of the DEPOX judicial deposit form, based on Design Thinking workshops, user observation, plain language, and visual law.
relatedReports.label: See Report

relatedReports.description: Official UAILab/TJMG report on a practical Design Thinking workshop delivered as part of the Judicial School's participatory management course.
